name: Chicken Stir-Fry (Hl)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boneless chicken cutlets, cut into 1-inch slices
1 cup homemade chicken stock or low-sodium bouillon
1 cup red or green peppers, sliced into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the chicken with soy sauce and ginger for several hours in the refrigerator, stirring occasionally.
2. In a large non-stick skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
3. Add garlic and sauté 2 minutes.
4. Add chicken with marinade, broccoli, and carrots to the skillet. Cook until the chicken loses its pink color.
5. Add chicken broth, snow peas, mushrooms, and peppers. Cover and reduce heat to low.
6. Cook for 15 minutes, stirring frequently.
7. Season with salt and pepper.
Yield: 4 servings
Serving size: 1/4 of recipe
Nutritional information per serving: 285 Calories (Courtesy of Weigh Less, Live Longer)
